question_intent: Average points per driver for constructors from Australia that have won at least one race in 2005

plan.question_intent: Average points per driver for constructors from Australia that have won at least one race in 2005
plan.detail_query: SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name AS constructor_name, AVG(cs.points) AS average_points FROM drivers d JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid JOIN constructors c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid JOIN races ra ON cs.raceid = ra.raceid WHERE c.nationality = 'Australian' AND ra.year = 2005 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM constructorresults cr WHERE cr.constructorid = c.constructorid AND cr.points > 0) GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name HAVING COUNT(cr.constructorid) >= 1

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name AS constructor_name, cs.points
join_clauses: JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN races ra ON cs.raceid = ra.raceid
where_clauses: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM constructorresults cr WHERE cr.constructorid = c.constructorid AND cr.points > 0)
blocks.group_by_clause: GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name, cs.points
blocks.notes: Selects driver details, constructor name, and points for Australian constructors that have won at least one race in 2005

blocks.name: root
blocks.notes: Calculates the average points per driver for the selected constructors

JOIN constructors c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid

JOIN races ra ON cs.raceid = ra.raceid

steps.clause: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM constructorresults cr WHERE cr.constructorid = c.constructorid AND cr.points > 0)
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN races ra ON cs.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2005) AND (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM constructorresults cr WHERE cr.constructorid = c.constructorid AND cr.points > 0))
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM results r2 WHERE r2.constructorid = c.constructorid AND r2.points > 0)
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN races ra ON cs.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2005) AND (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM results r2 WHERE r2.constructorid = c.constructorid AND r2.points > 0))
LIMIT 5

SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name AS constructor_name, cs.points
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN races ra ON cs.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2005) AND (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM results r2 WHERE r2.constructorid = c.constructorid AND r2.points > 0))
GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name, cs.points

build_logs.notes: Calculates the average points per driver for the selected constructors

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name AS constructor_name, cs.points
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN races ra ON cs.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2005) AND (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM results r2 WHERE r2.constructorid = c.constructorid AND r2.points > 0))
GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name, cs.points) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.points) AS average_points
FROM (SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name AS constructor_name, cs.points
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN races ra ON cs.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2005) AND (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM results r2 WHERE r2.constructorid = c.constructorid AND r2.points > 0))
GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name, cs.points) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.avg_points) AS average_points
FROM (SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name AS constructor_name, AVG(cs.points) AS avg_points
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN constructors c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN races ra ON cs.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2010) AND (cs.wins >= 0)
GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, c.name
HAVING (AVG(cs.points) > 0)) AS leaf_1

SELECT SUM(leaf_1.points) AS total_points
FROM (SELECT cr.raceid, r.year, r.round, r.name AS race_name, c.name AS constructor_name, cr.points
FROM constructorresults AS cr
JOIN races AS r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN constructors AS cons ON cr.constructorid = cons.constructorid
WHERE (cons.nationality = 'British')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average number of points scored by drivers, where for each driver we first calculate their points while considering only constructors that have scored points in at least one race since 2005?
